user.title: eBUS Bridge
user.description: Connect to ebusd. Requires the TCP command port (write) and the HTTP-JSON port (read) to be exposed.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach ebusd. Are ports 8888 (TCP) and 8889 (HTTP) exposed?

abort.already_configured: This ebusd instance is already configured.

data.fast: Read directly from the bus (substrings, comma-separated) – these stay as fresh as the poll interval. Use sparingly!
data.poll_priority: ebusd poll priority (0 = off, 1 = most frequent)
